authoredShaderContract.colorPath: Geometry Attribute col Color → Emission Color
authoredShaderContract.strengthPath: Geometry Attribute power Vector → Emission Strength
authoredShaderContract.browserResolution: The portable dump retains Vert.017's evaluated col/power fields. The root's alternating named-attribute field survives instancing and realization into the single flat.nodes draw group.

capture.toneMapping: NoToneMapping preserves the extracted zero/one linear emission field in the authored evidence capture; it does not claim identical Eevee and WebGL color management.

interpretation: The previous all-black browser result was an extraction defect: the old dump omitted Vert.017's evaluated attributes even though Blender retained them. Restoring that dependency recovers the authored black-and-white spiral/checker pattern without changing topology. The local-space capture also removes the source scene object's placement transform so Blender and WebGL compare the same standalone generator output.
